words.exampleArabic: حَقَّقَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ إِيرَادَاتٍ قِيَاسِيَّةً فِي الرُّبْعِ الثَّالِثِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je ostvarila rekordne prihode u trećem kvartalu.
words.exampleEn: The company achieved record revenues in the third quarter.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَوَقَّفُ بَقَاءُ أَيِّ شَرِكَةٍ عَلَى تَحْقِيقِ الرِّبْحِ الْمُسْتَدَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Opstanak svake kompanije ovisi o ostvarivanju održivog profita.
words.exampleEn: The survival of any company depends on achieving sustainable profit.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ نَجَاحُ الْمَشْرُوعِ اسْتِثْمَارًا مُبَكِّرًا فِي الْبُنْيَةِ التَّحْتِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Uspjeh projekta zahtijeva rano ulaganje u infrastrukturu.
words.exampleEn: The project's success requires early investment in infrastructure.

words.exampleArabic: خَصَّصَتِ الإِدَارَةُ مِيزَانِيَّةً إِضَافِيَّةً لِلْبَحْثِ وَالتَّطْوِيرِ.
words.exampleBs: Uprava je dodijelila dodatni budžet za istraživanje i razvoj.
words.exampleEn: Management allocated an additional budget for research and development.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى الشَّرِكَةُ إِلَى تَخْفِيضِ التَّكَالِيفِ التَّشْغِيلِيَّةِ دُونَ الْإِخْلَالِ بِالْجَوْدَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija nastoji smanjiti operativne troškove bez narušavanja kvaliteta.
words.exampleEn: The company seeks to reduce operational costs without compromising quality.

words.exampleArabic: تُحَاوِلُ الشَّرِكَةُ تَوْسِيعَ حِصَّتِهَا السُّوقِيَّةِ فِي مَنْطَقَةِ الشَّرْقِ الأَوْسَطِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija pokušava proširiti tržišni udio na području Bliskog istoka.
words.exampleEn: The company is trying to expand its market share in the Middle East region.

words.exampleArabic: تَشْتَدُّ الْمُنَافَسَةُ بَيْنَ الشَّرِكَاتِ التِّقْنِيَّةِ فِي مَجَالِ الذَّكَاءِ الِاصْطِنَاعِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Konkurencija između tehnoloških kompanija u oblasti vještačke inteligencije se pojačava.
words.exampleEn: Competition among technology companies in the field of artificial intelligence is intensifying.

words.exampleArabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الشَّرِكَتَانِ عَنِ اندِمَاجٍ تِجَارِيٍّ يُخَلِّقُ عِمْلَاقًا صِنَاعِيًّا جَدِيدًا.
words.exampleBs: Dvije kompanije su najavile poslovni spoj koji stvara novog industrijskog giganta.
words.exampleEn: The two companies announced a merger creating a new industrial giant.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الشَّرِكَةُ فِي التَّوْظِيفِ عَلَى آلِيَّاتِ الذَّكَاءِ الِاصْطِنَاعِيِّ لِفَرْزِ الطَّلَبَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija u zapošljavanju koristi mehanizme vještačke inteligencije za sortiranje prijava.
words.exampleEn: The company uses artificial intelligence mechanisms in recruitment to sort applications.

words.exampleArabic: يُجْرَى تَقْيِيمُ الأَدَاءِ السَّنَوِيُّ فِي نِهَايَةِ كُلِّ عَامٍ مَالِيٍّ.
words.exampleBs: Godišnje ocjenjivanje učinka provodi se na kraju svake finansijske godine.
words.exampleEn: Annual performance review is conducted at the end of each financial year.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَتِ الْمُوَظَّفَةُ عَلَى إِجَازَةِ أُمُومَةٍ مَدْفُوعَةِ الأَجْرِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثَةِ أَشْهُرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Zaposlenica je dobila plaćeni porodiljski dopust u trajanju od tri mjeseca.
words.exampleEn: The employee received three months of paid maternity leave.

words.exampleArabic: قَدَّمَ الْمُدِيرُ الْعَامُّ اسْتِقَالَتَهُ فِي أَعْقَابِ الأَزْمَةِ الإِدَارِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Generalni direktor je podnio ostavku nakon upravljačke krize.
words.exampleEn: The general manager submitted his resignation following the management crisis.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَوْجِبُ الْفَصْلُ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ الِالْتِزَامَ بِالإِجْرَاءَاتِ الْقَانُونِيَّةِ الْمُعْتَمَدَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Raskid radnog odnosa zahtijeva poštivanje utvrđenih zakonskih procedura.
words.exampleEn: Termination of employment requires compliance with established legal procedures.

words.exampleArabic: يَخْضَعُ الْمُوَظَّفُ الْجَدِيدُ لِفَتْرَةِ تَجْرِبَةٍ مَدَّتُهَا سِتَّةُ أَشْهُرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Novi zaposlenik prolazi kroz probni period od šest mjeseci.
words.exampleEn: The new employee undergoes a six-month probation period.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الشَّرِكَةُ نَهْجًا فِي الْقِيَادَةِ يُشَجِّعُ الإِبْدَاعَ وَالِابْتِكَارَ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija primjenjuje pristup liderstvu koji potiče kreativnost i inovacije.
words.exampleEn: The company adopts a leadership approach that encourages creativity and innovation.

words.exampleArabic: يَلْجَأُ الْمُدِيرُ الْكُفْءُ إِلَى التَّفْوِيضِ لِتَوْزِيعِ الْمَهَامِّ بِكَفَاءَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kompetentan menadžer pribjegava delegiranju kako bi efikasno raspodijelio zadatke.
words.exampleEn: A competent manager resorts to delegation to distribute tasks efficiently.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَزِّزُ الْمَسَاءَلَةُ الثِّقَةَ بَيْنَ الإِدَارَةِ وَالْمُوَظَّفِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Odgovornost jača povjerenje između uprave i zaposlenika.
words.exampleEn: Accountability strengthens trust between management and employees.

words.exampleArabic: تُسَاعِدُ التَّغْذِيَةُ الرَّاجِعَةُ الْبَنَّاءَةُ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ عَلَى تَطْوِيرِ مَهَارَاتِهِمْ.
words.exampleBs: Konstruktivna povratna informacija pomaže zaposlenicima da razviju svoje vještine.
words.exampleEn: Constructive feedback helps employees develop their skills.

words.exampleArabic: عَقَدَ الْفَرِيقُ جَلْسَةَ عَصْفٍ ذِهْنِيٍّ لِإِيجَادِ حَلٍّ مُبْتَكَرٍ لِلْمُشْكِلَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Tim je održao brainstorming sesiju kako bi pronašao kreativno rješenje problema.
words.exampleEn: The team held a brainstorming session to find an innovative solution to the problem.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَاهِمُ التَّوَاصُلُ الْمِهَنِيُّ فِي فَتْحِ أَبْوَابٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِلتَّعَاوُنِ.
words.exampleBs: Profesionalno umrežavanje doprinosi otvaranju novih vrata za saradnju.
words.exampleEn: Professional networking contributes to opening new doors for collaboration.

words.exampleArabic: أَسَّسَ الشَّابُّ شَرِكَتَهُ النَّاشِئَةَ فِي مَجَالِ التِّقْنِيَّةِ الْمَالِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mladić je osnovao svoju startup kompaniju u oblasti finansijskih tehnologija.
words.exampleEn: The young man founded his startup in the field of financial technology.

words.exampleArabic: قَدَّمَ رَائِدُ الأَعْمَالِ خِطَّةَ عَمَلٍ مُفَصَّلَةً أَمَامَ الْمُسْتَثْمِرِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Poduzetnik je predstavio detaljan poslovni plan pred investitorima.
words.exampleEn: The entrepreneur presented a detailed business plan before investors.

words.exampleArabic: نَجَحَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ النَّاشِئَةُ فِي الْحُصُولِ عَلَى تَمْوِيلٍ أَوَّلِيٍّ بِقِيمَةِ مِلْيُونِ دُولَارٍ.
words.exampleBs: Startup kompanija je uspjela osigurati početno finansiranje od milijun dolara.
words.exampleEn: The startup succeeded in securing initial funding of one million dollars.

words.exampleArabic: تَلْقَّتِ الشَّرِكَةُ دَعْمًا مَالِيًّا مِنْ صُنْدُوقِ رَأْسِ الْمَالِ الْمُجَازِفِ الْمَرْمُوقِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je primila finansijsku podršku od uglednog fonda rizičnog kapitala.
words.exampleEn: The company received financial support from a prestigious venture capital fund.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ الِابْتِكَارُ الْمُحَرِّكَ الرَّئِيسِيَّ لِلنُّمُوِّ الِاقْتِصَادِيِّ الْمُسْتَدَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Inovacija se smatra glavnim pokretačem održivog ekonomskog rasta.
words.exampleEn: Innovation is considered the main driver of sustainable economic growth.

words.exampleArabic: تَهْتَمُّ الشَّرِكَاتُ التِّقْنِيَّةُ بِقَابِلِيَّةِ التَّوَسُّعِ لِضَمَانِ نُمُوِّهَا الْمُسْتَقْبَلِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Tehnološke kompanije posvećuju pažnju skalabilnosti kako bi osigurale budući rast.
words.exampleEn: Technology companies pay attention to scalability to ensure future growth.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ الْمُرَاسَلَةُ الرَّسْمِيَّةُ بِأُسْلُوبٍ مُهَذَّبٍ وَلُغَةٍ دَقِيقَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Službena korespondencija odlikuje se uljudnim stilom i preciznim jezikom.
words.exampleEn: Formal correspondence is characterized by a polite style and precise language.

words.exampleArabic: وُزِّعَ جَدْوَلُ الأَعْمَالِ عَلَى الْمُشَارِكِينَ قَبْلَ الِاجْتِمَاعِ بِيَوْمٍ كَامِلٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dnevni red je distribuiran učesnicima cijeli dan prije sastanka.
words.exampleEn: The agenda was distributed to participants a full day before the meeting.

words.exampleArabic: أَعَدَّ السِّكْرِتِيرُ مَحْضَرَ الِاجْتِمَاعِ وَأَرْسَلَهُ إِلَى جَمِيعِ الأَطْرَافِ.
words.exampleBs: Sekretar je pripremio zapisnik sa sastanka i poslao ga svim stranama.
words.exampleEn: The secretary prepared the minutes of the meeting and sent them to all parties.

words.exampleArabic: أَرْسَلَ الْفَرِيقُ اقْتِرَاحًا مُفَصَّلًا إِلَى الْعَمِيلِ لِلنَّظَرِ فِيهِ.
words.exampleBs: Tim je poslao detaljan prijedlog klijentu na razmatranje.
words.exampleEn: The team sent a detailed proposal to the client for consideration.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ تَسْلِيمُ الْمَشْرُوعِ قَبْلَ الْمَوْعِدِ النِّهَائِيِّ الْمُحَدَّدِ.
words.exampleBs: Projekat mora biti isporučen prije utvrđenog krajnjeg roka.
words.exampleEn: The project must be delivered before the specified deadline.

words.exampleArabic: حَدَّدَ الْعَقْدُ النَّتَائِجَ الْمُتَوَقَّعَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ مَرْحَلَةٍ مِنْ مَرَاحِلِ الْمَشْرُوعِ.
words.exampleBs: Ugovor je definisao očekivane ishode svake faze projekta.
words.exampleEn: The contract specified the deliverables from each phase of the project.

words.exampleArabic: تَحْرِصُ الشَّرِكَةُ عَلَى تَوْفِيرِ بِيئَةِ عَمَلٍ صِحِّيَّةٍ لِجَمِيعِ مُوَظَّفِيهَا.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija nastoji osigurati zdravo radno okruženje za sve zaposlenike.
words.exampleEn: The company strives to provide a healthy work environment for all its employees.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَفَاوَتُ الرَّوَاتِبُ تَبَعًا لِلْخِبْرَةِ وَمُسْتَوَى التَّعْلِيمِ.
words.exampleBs: Plate variraju ovisno o iskustvu i nivou obrazovanja.
words.exampleEn: Salaries vary depending on experience and education level.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ الترَّقِّي الوَظِيفِيُّ عَادَةً عَلَى الأَدَاءِ وَالْكَفَاءَةِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Napredovanje u karijeri obično ovisi o učinku i ličnoj kompetentnosti.
words.exampleEn: Career advancement usually depends on performance and personal competence.

words.bs: rad na daljinu, rad od kuće
words.exampleArabic: انْتَشَرَ الْعَمَلُ عَنْ بُعْدٍ بِشَكْلٍ وَاسِعٍ فِي مَرْحَلَةِ مَا بَعْدَ الْجَائِحَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Rad na daljinu se znatno proširio u postpandemijskom periodu.
words.exampleEn: Remote work spread widely in the post-pandemic period.

words.bs: ravnoteža između posla i privatnog života
words.exampleArabic: يُوَلِّي الْجِيلُ الْجَدِيدُ اهْتِمَامًا بَالِغًا لِلتَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْحَيَاةِ.
words.exampleBs: Nova generacija pridaje veliku važnost ravnoteži između posla i privatnog života.
words.exampleEn: The new generation places great importance on work-life balance.

words.exampleArabic: تُؤَثِّرُ بِيئَةُ الْعَمَلِ الإِيجَابِيَّةُ تَأْثِيرًا مُبَاشِرًا فِي إِنْتَاجِيَّةِ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Pozitivno radno okruženje ima direktan utjecaj na produktivnost zaposlenika.
words.exampleEn: A positive work environment has a direct impact on employee productivity.

words.exampleArabic: تَحْرِصُ الْمُؤَسَّسَاتُ النَّاجِحَةُ عَلَى بِنَاءِ ثَقَافَةٍ مُؤَسَّسِيَّةٍ مُتَمَاسِكَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Uspješne organizacije nastoje izgraditi kohezivnu korporativnu kulturu.
words.exampleEn: Successful organizations strive to build a cohesive corporate culture.

words.exampleArabic: عَانَتِ الصِّنَاعَاتُ الْعَالَمِيَّةُ مِنِ اضْطِرَابٍ حَادٍّ فِي سَلَاسِلِ الإِمْدَادِ.
words.exampleBs: Globalne industrije su patile od ozbiljnih poremećaja u lancima snabdijevanja.
words.exampleEn: Global industries suffered from severe disruptions in supply chains.

words.exampleArabic: وَضَعَتِ الإِدَارَةُ الْعُلْيَا اسْتِرَاتِيجِيَّةً تِجَارِيَّةً طَمُوحَةً لِلسَّنَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Najviši menadžment je postavio ambicioznu poslovnu strategiju za narednih pet godina.
words.exampleEn: Senior management set an ambitious business strategy for the next five years.

words.exampleArabic: تُتَابِعُ الإِدَارَةُ مُؤَشِّرَاتِ الأَدَاءِ الرَّئِيسِيَّةَ بِصِفَةٍ أَسْبُوعِيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Uprava sedmično prati ključne indikatore učinka.
words.exampleEn: Management tracks key performance indicators on a weekly basis.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَوَلَّى إِدَارَةُ الْمَوَارِدِ الْبَشَرِيَّةِ مَلَفَّاتِ التَّوْظِيفِ وَالتَّدْرِيبِ.
words.exampleBs: Odjel za ljudske resurse upravlja dosjeima zapošljavanja i obuke.
words.exampleEn: The human resources department handles recruitment and training files.

words.exampleArabic: تُنَظِّمُ الشَّرِكَةُ دَوْرَاتٍ لِلتَّدْرِيبِ الْمِهَنِيِّ لِرَفْعِ كَفَاءَةِ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija organizuje kurseve stručne obuke radi podizanja kompetentnosti zaposlenika.
words.exampleEn: The company organizes professional training courses to raise employee competence.

words.exampleArabic: عُقِدَ الِاجْتِمَاعُ الطَّارِئُ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ الأَزْمَةِ الْمَالِيَّةِ الطَّارِئَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Hitni sastanak je održan radi rasprave o iznenadnoj finansijskoj krizi.
words.exampleEn: The emergency meeting was held to discuss the sudden financial crisis.

words.exampleArabic: وَقَّعَ الْمُوَظَّفُ عَقْدَ الْعَمَلِ بَعْدَ مُرَاجَعَتِهِ بِعِنَايَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Zaposlenik je potpisao ugovor o radu nakon pažljivog pregleda.
words.exampleEn: The employee signed the employment contract after careful review.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَهِّلُ التَّعَاوُنُ بَيْنَ الأَقْسَامِ تَحْقِيقَ الأَهْدَافِ الْمُشْتَرَكَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Saradnja između odjela olakšava postizanje zajedničkih ciljeva.
words.exampleEn: Cooperation between departments facilitates the achievement of shared goals.

words.exampleArabic: تَرْتَبِطُ الإِنْتَاجِيَّةُ ارْتِبَاطًا وَثِيقًا بِمُسْتَوَى الرِّضَا الوَظِيفِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Produktivnost je usko povezana s nivoom zadovoljstva poslom.
words.exampleEn: Productivity is closely linked to the level of job satisfaction.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَبَنَّى الشَّرِكَاتُ الْحَدِيثَةُ مُمَارَسَاتٍ تِجَارِيَّةً تُحَقِّقُ الِاسْتِدَامَةَ الْبِيئِيَّةَ.
words.exampleBs: Moderne kompanije usvajaju poslovne prakse kojima se postiže ekološka održivost.
words.exampleEn: Modern companies adopt business practices that achieve environmental sustainability.

words.exampleArabic: وَقَّعَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ اتِّفَاقِيَّةَ شَرَاكَةٍ مَعَ مُؤَسَّسَةٍ إِقْلِيمِيَّةٍ كُبْرَى.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je potpisala partnerski sporazum s vodećom regionalnom institucijom.
words.exampleEn: The company signed a partnership agreement with a major regional institution.

words.exampleArabic: تَدْعَمُ الْحُكُومَةُ الرِّيَادَةَ الشَّبَابِيَّةَ مِنْ خِلَالِ بَرَامِجَ مُتَخَصِّصَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Vlada podržava mladalačko poduzetništvo kroz specijalizovane programe.
words.exampleEn: The government supports youth entrepreneurship through specialized programs.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ إِدَارَةُ الْمَشَارِيعِ الْكَبِيرَةِ مَهَارَاتٍ تَنْظِيمِيَّةً وَتَوَاصُلِيَّةً عَالِيَةً.
words.exampleBs: Upravljanje velikim projektima zahtijeva visoke organizacijske i komunikacijske vještine.
words.exampleEn: Managing large projects requires high organizational and communication skills.

words.exampleArabic: يُرْفَقُ خِطَابُ التَّقْدِيمِ بِالسِّيرَةِ الذَّاتِيَّةِ عِنْدَ التَّقَدُّمِ لِشَغْلِ وَظِيفَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Propratno pismo se prilaže uz CV pri prijavi za posao.
words.exampleEn: The cover letter is attached to the CV when applying for a job.

words.exampleArabic: يَنْبَغِي أَنْ تَكُونَ السِّيرَةُ الذَّاتِيَّةُ مُحَدَّثَةً وَخَالِيَةً مِنَ الأَخْطَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Životopis treba biti ažuriran i bez grešaka.
words.exampleEn: The CV should be up to date and free of errors.

words.exampleArabic: تُشْتَرَطُ خَمْسُ سَنَوَاتٍ عَلَى الأَقَلِّ مِنَ الخِبْرَةِ الْمِهَنِيَّةِ لِشَغْلِ هَذَا الْمَنْصِبِ.
words.exampleBs: Zahtijeva se najmanje pet godina radnog iskustva za ovu poziciju.
words.exampleEn: At least five years of professional experience are required for this position.
